queries.q: Write up the notes from today's backlog refinement: stories estimated, questions raised, decisions made
Half the team missed grooming. Capture what we estimated and decided so they can catch up.
Document the outcomes of the refinement session: the payments epic got split and two stories are blocked on legal
Turn my scratchpad from this afternoon's grooming session into structured notes with open questions and owners
Before sprint planning, summarize what got refined this week and which stories are actually ready
Capture the estimates and scope changes we agreed in refinement, plus the spike we decided to run first
Record the backlog grooming outcomes: points per story, parking lot items, and what we refine next session
A new engineer joined mid-quarter. Put together refinement notes that explain how these backlog stories evolved and where they stand.
These five stories went stale and we re-refined them today. Document what changed and the new estimates.
Summarize today's refinement so absent folks know which stories moved to ready and what's still blocked
Write the user stories with acceptance criteria for the payments epic before we bring them to refinement
queries.notes: Authoring the stories themselves, not recording session outcomes

queries.q: Send a recap of this morning's leadership sync with decisions and action items
queries.notes: General meeting summary, not a backlog-refinement record

queries.q: Facilitate and document the sprint retro: what went well, what didn't, what we'll change
Write Given/When/Then acceptance criteria for the checkout story
Fix the flaky Jest test in the backlog service repo
The login story is refined; now enumerate its failure scenarios and error states for QA
Summarize the quarterly business review meeting for the folks who couldn't attend
queries.notes: Absent-attendee summary, but not a refinement session

queries.q: Draft the sprint goal and pick which stories go into next sprint
Renew my passport: what documents do I need?
Write release notes for the features that shipped this sprint
